content: Orchestrator skill must document paths to key config files: ~/.orch/config.yaml, opencode config, MCP server configs
reason: Orchestrator wasted time searching for config locations that should be known

content: Skill-based spawns should auto-inject local ecosystem context
reason: Agents shouldn't need manual context about what local projects exist (glass, beads, kb-cli, etc). This is knowable system state that should be in spawn context automatically.

content: Should orch ecosystem context (local projects, tools, conventions) be injected into ALL spawns regardless of working directory, or only spawns within ecosystem repos?
Use localhost instead of 127.0.0.1 for local URLs
reason: 127.0.0.1:5188 didn't resolve but localhost:5188 works - likely browser or DNS quirk

content: Glass for collaborative browser (orchestrator + human), Playwright for isolated verification (workers, E2E tests). Glass CLI for validation gates.
reason: Architect session orch-go-ow3g: Glass shares Dylan's Chrome via CDP, Playwright spawns isolated instances. Different browser models for different use cases.

content: Ecosystem context injection: always inject tooling docs (bd/kb/orch), inject project registry only for ecosystem repos
reason: Design-session orch-go-tr0b: Agents everywhere need tooling knowledge, but project registry (what glass/beads are) only relevant in ecosystem repos

content: Orch uses OpenCode, not Claude Code. Hook system is different: OpenCode uses .opencode/plugin/ with JS/TS modules and events (session.created, tool.execute.before), not ~/.claude/hooks/ with bash scripts
reason: Agent implemented wrong platform's hooks because orchestrator skill references Claude Code patterns

content: price-watch project uses Docker for all commands - use 'docker compose exec frontend npm ...' or 'docker compose exec rails ...' instead of running npm/rails directly on host
reason: Agents kept trying 'cd price-watch/frontend && npm' which fails because npm isn't on host PATH - all services run in Docker

content: kn CLI is deprecated and functionality merged into kb quick subcommands
reason: Investigation confirmed kn --help shows explicit deprecation notice with migration path; kb quick provides all kn commands (decide, tried, constrain, question)

content: SpawnTelemetry uses GapAnalysis as fallback for KB context stats
reason: GapAnalysis already has MatchStatistics with all counts needed; avoids passing KBContextFormatResult through Config

content: Design questioning should be unconditional for systematic-debugging
reason: Current conditional triggers (3+ fails, 2+ similar history) miss first-time successful fixes

content: Design-First Gate before Design Implications completion gate
reason: Testing one intervention at a time. Added orchestrator-level Design-First Gate first. Will add systematic-debugging completion gate only if issue framing alone doesn't improve fix depth.

content: When should design discussions happen in orchestrator chat vs spawning design-session? We're having valuable design conversations (root cause thinking, agent waiting) directly but not using the skill. Is orchestrator-Dylan conversation sufficient, or are we losing rigor/artifacts by not spawning?
Silent agent waiting is Claude model behavior, not skill guidance
reason: Investigation showed skills have no wait-for-approval language; Claude naturally treats step-lists as proposals awaiting confirmation

content: Dashboard uses attention-first layout with single unified view
reason: Ops/History mode toggle solved wrong problem. Dylan needs binary classification: attention needed vs swarm OK.

content: Behavioral patterns dashboard shows cross-project noise (beads, price-watch failures in orch-go dashboard). Suppress button copies command that doesn't exist. Need: either implement orch patterns suppress, or filter action-log by project.
Update global CLAUDE.md to replace Claude Code hook references
result: No hook references existed - file was already using OpenCode plugin terminology

content: skill source of truth is ~/orch-knowledge/skills/src/, not ~/.claude/skills/
reason: skillc deploy copies from source to ~/.claude/skills; edits should go to source

content: skill source of truth is ~/orch-knowledge/skills/src/, not ~/.claude/skills/
reason: skillc deploy copies from source to ~/.claude/skills; edits should go to source

content: Issue tab implementation verified complete
reason: Prior agent fully implemented API and UI. Commit 2ffc0f0c contains full implementation.

content: OpenCode has no /health endpoint - use GET /session for health checks
reason: 4 separate investigations (Dec 23-28) all reached same conclusion

content: OpenCode session storage is project-partitioned by first git root commit hash
reason: x-opencode-directory header determines which storage partition is searched

content: Headless spawn is production-ready
reason: 17 investigations (Dec 20-30) confirmed: 8 bugs fixed, all 5 readiness requirements met. One edge case remains (race condition on rapid spawns).
